expertAssessments.rationale: The targeted production recheck exercised the exact Q3 wording after the entity extractor scan wording fix. The response used the whole-fleet anomaly evidence path and surfaced cache-redis-dc1-01 memory warning/action instead of stopping at generic server-health evidence.
